zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Andrews II於1284年出生在英國越可爾曼諾時，他的父親Sir, Ralph Andrews , I25歲，母親Lady Mary Thompson22歲。他於1317年與Lady, Joan Whitney在英國越可爾曼諾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1334年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Andrews II于1284年出生在英国越可爾曼諾时，他的父亲Sir, Ralph Andrews , I25岁，母亲Lady Mary Thompson22岁。他于1317年与Lady, Joan Whitney在英国越可爾曼諾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1334年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Andrews II was born in 1284, in Manor, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir, Ralph Andrews , I, was 25 and his mother, Lady Mary Thompson, was 22. He married Lady, Joan Whitney in 1317, in Manor, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1334, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Andrews II est né en 1284, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir, Ralph Andrews , I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Thompson, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady, Joan Whitney en 1317, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1334, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Andrews II 1284 in Manor, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir, Ralph Andrews , I 25 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Thompson 22. Er hat 1317 in Manor, Yorkshire, England Lady, Joan Whitney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1334 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Andrews II è nato il nel 1284 nel Manor, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir, Ralph Andrews , I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Thompson, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Lady, Joan Whitney nel 1317, nel Manor, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1334, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Andrews IIが1284年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーで生まれた時，父Sir, Ralph Andrews , Iは25歳，母Lady Mary Thompsonは22歳であった。1317年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーでLady, Joan Whitneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1334年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Andrews II(이)가 1284년 영국 요르크실르 먼어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir, Ralph Andrews , I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Thompson(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1317년 영국 요르크실르 먼어에서 Lady, Joan Whitney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1334년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Andrews II nasceu em 1284, em Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir, Ralph Andrews , I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Thompson, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady, Joan Whitney em 1317, em Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1334, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Andrews II родился в 1284 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir, Ralph Andrews , I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Thompson, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady, Joan Whitney в 1317 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1334 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Andrews II nació en 1284, en Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir, Ralph Andrews , I, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Thompson, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Lady, Joan Whitney en 1317, en Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1334, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
